name: Inox Wind Limited
summary: Inox Wind Limited manufactures and sells wind turbine generators and components for independent power producers, utilities, public sector undertakings, and corporate and retail customers in India. It also provides a range of services, such as wind resource assessment, site acquisition to infrastructure development, erection and commissioning, long-term operations and maintenance services for wind power projects. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Noida, India. Inox Wind Limited is a subsidiary of GFL Limited.
